summary: CBP retweet of the DHS self-deportation promo: a silent two-outcome comparison with bold text overlays ('IF ICE FINDS YOU' over a takedown vs 'IF YOU SELF-DEPORT' over migrants boarding a charter plane), ending on the CBP Home app screen with a $1,000 exit bonus. A slogan/text-over-B-roll app promo with no music or genre styling, so out of scope.
notable_text: IF ICE FINDS YOU; IF YOU SELF-DEPORT; Home - Getting You Home Quickly And Easily; Receive a $1,000 exit bonus; DHS.GOV/CBPHOME
